commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Claude-CLI-only transcript flush gating for persisted CLI session bindings, a trailing orphaned tool-use invalidator, reseed reason plumbing, and focused tests.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction was established against current main in this read-only review. The failure is source-reproducible through buildCliRunResult, updateSessionStoreAfterAgentRun, and the existing next-turn transcript predicate, and the PR body provides useful live logs for the reported failure modes.
